description:
Operating Area: 
Summer: Croatia
Winter: Red Sea

Experience the epitome of luxury yachting aboard Eldamar, where every moment is designed to be extraordinary.

1. Exceptional Eldamar Crew
Our exceptional crew is dedicated to creating a remarkable experience. Proficient several languages, they effortlessly cater to an international clientele, ensuring flawless communication and making guests feel perfectly at home. Their expertise and warm hospitality are the essence of the Eldamar experience.

2. Exquisite Culinary Experience
Savor gourmet cuisine crafted by our outstanding chef, who is devoted to delivering culinary masterpieces. Utilizing the freshest ingredients, our chef designs a menu that caters to every palate, ensuring a dining experience as unforgettable as the voyage itself.

3. Flybridge with Full Bar and Extra Dining Area
The Flybridge, featuring a full bar and additional dining area, offers an elevated, spacious, and luxurious venue for socializing and dining. Enjoy breathtaking panoramic views and enhance your sailing experience in refined elegance.

4. Thrilling Water Sports Equipment
For the adventurous spirit, Eldamar is equipped with an array of premium water sports equipment:

• 2x Seabobs & double the adventure: With two Seabobs on board, dive and explore the underwater world with our powerful and easy-to-use seabobs in a simultaneously dive, doubling the excitement and freedom!
• Efoil: Experience the thrill of flying above the water with our cutting-edge efoil boards.
• Windsurfing (kids) gear: For kids who crave the wind and waves, our windsurfing equipment provides the perfect escape.

Lots of other Water Toys such as 2x SUP’s and a wide variety of Snorkelling Gear !

5. Hydraulic Swim Platform
The hydraulic swim platform offers seamless access to the sea, transforming into your private beach at the touch of a button. This feature enhances safety and provides a versatile space for relaxation and water activities.

6. Advanced Water Purifier System
Prioritizing sustainability and health, our advanced water purifier system ensures guests enjoy pristine, purified water, offering a safe and eco-friendly experience throughout their journey.

7. Quiet Luxury with Silent Watermakers
A standout feature of our yacht is the two state-of-the-art silent watermakers on board. These advanced systems operate silently, without the need for a generator, ensuring an uninterrupted and serene environment. Enjoy the peace and quiet of your surroundings while we provide you with fresh, pure water on demand..

8. Contemporary Elegance
Eldamar features a contemporary design that seamlessly combines aesthetic appeal with functional excellence. From its sleek exterior to its sophisticated interiors, every detail is crafted to provide an unparalleled experience on the water.

toys.label: Aqualung Snorkel Gear - a wide variety of sizes

crew.name: Dominik Moharic
crew.bio:
Dominik is a seasoned sailor with over 40,000 nautical miles under his belt, making him an expert in navigating the world’s most beautiful routes and destinations. His comprehensive knowledge of the ship’s technical details ensures that every aspect of your journey runs seamlessly.
Passionate about sailing, Dominik thrives on the open sea, where he can share his love for adventure and create unforgettable moments with his guests. Whether it’s smooth cruising or catching the perfect wind, Dominik’s experience and enthusiasm will make your time on the water truly exceptional.

crew.name: Jelena Percovic
crew.bio:
Nation: Croatian

Jelena brings a keen eye for beauty and a meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that every aspect of your journey feels luxurious and welcoming. With years of experience aboard yachts in stunning destinations, she effortlessly creates an atmosphere where guests feel relaxed and at home.
A talented chef, Jelena’s passion for cooking shines through in every dish she prepares, thoughtfully tailored to your tastes and influenced by local flavors. Her love for travel and exceptional hospitality makes each trip a personalized, unforgettable experience where you are truly pampered.
